46 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Wife is of Falsehood & unworthy/unbecoming character
For this we say she is philanthropist or benefactor. When
there is a combination of Moon + Mercury with Venus or if there
is a combination of Jupiter + Mercury + Moon or independently
posited in l, 5 9 and if Moon is debilitated in the same chart the
native will have falsehood and unworthy character.
Wife is a powerful woman
In the horoscope if Venus, Mars, Jupiter are posited in 1, 5,
9 or Venus+ Mercury+ Jupiter are posited in one sign the native
will rule with-authority, and will have a stubborn character. She will
carry on as per her will.
Wife will have a job equivalent to doctor;
In a female chart if Jupiter, Saturn are combined in 2nd, 5th
to Venus the native will have a job equivalent to doctor. In some
charts ifthere is a combination of Jupiter + Saturn + Ketu the
